title: Few things i want to know about Evangelion
display_title: Few things i want to know about Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Few things i want to know about Evangelion             Quote Post by 1412 » Sun Dec 05, 2010 10:40 am I just watched the TV series.At the end did he go back to the world with everyone else? or not? also id like to know wich ending is a good one? (ive seen some ppl say that EoE ending is good/bad.I really dont mind spoilers!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:13 am If you haven't seen The End of Evangelion yet, really should before you start asking people questions like this.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Dec 05, 2010 12:16 pm There is no right answer really. Its up to you whether you want to treat EOTV and EOE as two different endings or two parts of the same ending (the divergent and convergent theory as some bloke on a podcast said recently ;)). Many that doesnt stop many many people seeking the 'true' answer that probably doesnt exist. And as a side note, the wiki that accompanies this site says: It is a commonly held belief that Hideaki Anno created End of Evangelion as a form of revenge against Evangelion fans unhappy with the existing ending to the TV series. In reality, the End of Evangelion is closer to the original concept for the series ending, which was changed due to budget and censorship issues. It's also a commonly held belief that the Death threats flashed on screen in End of Evangelion were for the ending of the TV series, when in fact, the Death threats shown on screen at least, were in regards to Evangelion Death And Rebirth's ending. Most of these 'death threats' were, in fact, letters of praise and encouragement. Only two can really be considered 'death threats', while only one can really even be considered 'hate mail'.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:05 pm EoE  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Dec 05, 2010 3:01 pm Jayfive wrote: But yes, watch End Of Evangelion first.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 05, 2010 3:08 pm ^ He meant watch EoE first before asking any questions about either, not before watching the series.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Dec 05, 2010 4:13 pm Oh. I'm a dumbass.

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Mon Dec 13, 2010 7:21 am Wouldnt Common sense Dictate that the last evangelion (End of Evangelion) would be the canon one in which Shinji dooms the world & saves Asuka to be his slave j/k Seriously though End of Evangelion would be the Canon ending. i wouldn't exactly say it was a "good" ending though.

[]:             Quote Post by 1412 » Mon Dec 13, 2010 3:51 pm Thanks for the awesome replys guys! <3 i just havent had the time to watch :(

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Dec 14, 2010 1:38 pm ran1 wrote: EoE  SPOILER: Show
